name: NavList
description: Vertical label-only nav list — labelled block where each row carries a label (and optional secondary line) plus a trailing chevron, and routes via `href` / `onClick`. Wraps a [Header](../header/header.md) over a [List](../list/nav.md) so the section title and the route group come bundled. Reach for it on category indexes, settings menus, and 'pick a sub-page' surfaces where no leading thumbnail belongs.
wrapperGuidance: Owns its inline padding internally. Place as a direct child of the page-shell <main> (or any host that pays the gutter once). Do NOT wrap in a padding-inline div, className="px-*", or style={{ padding }} — the page rail is paid once at the shell, never on the full-bleed child. Inside a bounded surface (Dialog / BottomSheet / SideSheet), apply the negative-margin opt-out — see AGENTS.md § Composition rules.

standalone.context: Direct child of the page shell or any host that pays the page-rail gutter once.

embedded.trigger: prop `embedded={true}` on <NavList /> OR direct child of `.chorus-section` / `.chorus-feed` (DOM-ancestry safety net).
embedded.context: Composed inside another rail-responsible host. Row content takes over from the host's content-box edge.
